text: Spec FROZEN to docs/architecture.md (bl-cac0, delivered f30640b). Build against that path — the authoritative §0-§17 greenfield reference — not the now-archived working ball bl-2e26. Substantive design changes need a new design ball + a §15 revision-log entry in the doc; corrections to already-built phases stay tracked here under bl-72a8.
